title: Player Head Wizard
description: Load you head when renaming in anvil!
body:
# PlayerHeadWizard

Change head texture easily!

## How to use?

You take the player's head, put it in the anvil and give it a name `profile=<Insert your player nickname>`.

Does not require any commands/active cheats.

Mod is Server-side. Client side is optional!

## Showcase

![showcase](https://0mods.team/data/phw_preview.gif)
